title: Stardevlive Cobblemon
description: a simple cobblemon mod pack used by the stardevlive server
body:
Embark on a thrilling Cobblemon adventure enriched with the intricate machinery of the Create mod, and an extensive collection of Cobblemon addons. Enhance your gaming experience with performance mods to ensure smooth gameplay. Whether you're building complex contraptions, exploring new biomes, or training your Cobblemon, this modpack offers a diverse and engaging experience for all players.

This modpack is specially crafted for the StarDevLive server, ensuring a unique and optimized experience for all its members. Join the community and dive into a world where creativity and adventure come together, providing endless opportunities for fun and collaboration.

this pack includes the bliss shader pack [https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader) as well as the hiddenmon addon [https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hiddenmons-cobblemon)
